findings.title: Missing test for new `WalletEvent::TransactionsChainlocked` no-op arm
Identical `path_resolver` closure duplicated across both backends
TransactionsChainlocked no-op leaves is_chain_locked permanently stale for late-chainlocked transactions
Actual fee paid silently discarded

rounds.judgeSummary: Dependency upgrade is mechanical and correct. The one gap worth closing is the missing test for `TransactionsChainlocked` — every other `map_wallet_event` arm has one, and CLAUDE.md requires edge-case coverage. The discarded `_fee` and duplicated `path_resolver` are real but low-priority follow-up items, not blockers for a dep bump.
